ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall amount recorded */,
  "evaporation" REAL /* Evaporation amount recorded */,
  "sunshine" REAL /* Sunshine hours recorded */,
  "wind_gust_dir" INTEGER /* Wind gust direction */,
  "wind_gust_speed" INTEGER /* Wind gust speed */,
  "wind_dir_9am" INTEGER /* Wind direction at 9 AM */,
  "wind_dir_3pm" INTEGER /* Wind direction at 3 PM */,
  "wind_speed_9am" INTEGER /* Wind speed at 9 AM */,
  "wind_speed_3pm" INTEGER /* Wind speed at 3 PM */,
  "humidity_9am" INTEGER /* Humidity at 9 AM */,
  "humidity_3pm" INTEGER /* Humidity at 3 PM */,
  "pressure_9am" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at 9 AM */,
  "pressure_3pm" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at 3 PM */,
  "cloud_9am" INTEGER /* Cloud cover at 9 AM */,
  "cloud_3pm" INTEGER /* Cloud cover at 3 PM */,
  "temp_9am" REAL /* Temperature at 9 AM */,
  "temp_3pm" REAL /* Temperature at 3 PM */,
  "rain_today" INTEGER /* Rainfall recorded today (0 - No, 1 - Yes) */,
  "rain_tomorrow" INTEGER /* Rainfall forecast for tomorrow (0 - No, 1 - Yes) */,
  "date_month" INTEGER /* Month of the date */,
  "date_day" INTEGER /* Day of the date */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data the forecast is based on */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "min_temp_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted minimum temperature */,
  "max_temp_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted maximum temperature */,
  "rainfall_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted rainfall amount */,
  "evaporation_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted evaporation amount */,
  "sunshine_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted sunshine hours */,
  "wind_gust_speed_forecast" INTEGER /* Forecasted wind gust speed */,
  "humidity_forecast_9am" INTEGER /* Forecasted humidity at 9 AM */,
  "humidity_forecast_3pm" INTEGER /* Forecasted humidity at 3 PM */,
  "pressure_forecast_9am" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure at 9 AM */,
  "pressure_forecast_3pm" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure at 3 PM */,
  "cloud_forecast_9am" INTEGER /* Forecasted cloud cover at 9 AM */,
  "cloud_forecast_3pm" INTEGER /* Forecasted cloud cover at 3 PM */,
  "temp_forecast_9am" REAL /* Forecasted temperature at 9 AM */,
  "temp_forecast_3pm" REAL /* Forecasted temperature at 3 PM */,
  "rain_forecast_today" INTEGER /* Forecasted rainfall for today (0 - No, 1 - Yes) */,
  "rain_forecast_tomorrow" INTEGER /* Forecasted rainfall for tomorrow (0 - No, 1 - Yes) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather model used to generate the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "min_temp_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted minimum temperature */,
  "max_temp_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted maximum temperature */,
  "rainfall_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted rainfall amount */,
  "evaporation_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted evaporation amount */,
  "sunshine_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted sunshine hours */,
  "wind_gust_speed_forecast" INTEGER /* Forecasted wind gust speed */,
  "humidity_forecast_9am" INTEGER /* Forecasted humidity at 9 AM */,
  "humidity_forecast_3pm" INTEGER /* Forecasted humidity at 3 PM */,
  "pressure_forecast_9am" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure at 9 AM */,
  "pressure_forecast_3pm" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure at 3 PM */,
  "cloud_forecast_9am" INTEGER /* Forecasted cloud cover at 9 AM */,
  "cloud_forecast_3pm" INTEGER /* Forecasted cloud cover at 3 PM */,
  "temp_forecast_9am" REAL /* Forecasted temperature at 9 AM */,
  "temp_forecast_3pm" REAL /* Forecasted temperature at 3 PM */,
  "rain_forecast_today" INTEGER /* Forecasted rainfall for today (0 - No, 1 - Yes) */,
  "rain_forecast_tomorrow" INTEGER /* Forecasted rainfall for tomorrow (0 - No, 1 - Yes) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES weather_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the collected data in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
